infos.name: 厨房
infos.desc:
You've just shown up in a 厨房.



You need an unguarded exit? You should try going south. You need an unblocked exit? You should try going west.

infos.name: 家中
infos.desc:
You're now in a 家中.

 You can make out a food waste bin.[if c_0 is open and there is something in the c_0] The food waste bin contains [a list of things in the c_0], so there's that.[end if][if c_0 is open and the c_0 contains nothing] Empty! What kind of nightmare TextWorld is this?[end if] As if things weren't amazing enough already, you can even see a recyclable bin. Is this what you came to TextWorld for? This... recyclable bin?[if c_1 is open and there is something in the c_1] The recyclable bin contains [a list of things in the c_1]. Is this what you came to TextWorld for? This... recyclable bin?[end if][if c_1 is open and the c_1 contains nothing] Empty! What kind of nightmare TextWorld is this?[end if] You bend down to tie your shoe. When you stand up, you notice a hazardous waste bin.[if c_2 is open and there is something in the c_2] The hazardous waste bin contains [a list of things in the c_2].[end if][if c_2 is open and the c_2 contains nothing] The hazardous waste bin is empty, what a horrible day![end if] You see an other waste bin. You idly wonder how they came up with the name TextWorld for this place. It's pretty fitting.[if c_3 is open and there is something in the c_3] The other waste bin contains [a list of things in the c_3].[end if][if c_3 is open and the c_3 contains nothing] What a letdown! The other waste bin is empty![end if]

There is an exit to the east. Don't worry, it is unguarded. There is an unblocked exit to the south.

infos.name: 花园
infos.desc:
I am pleased to announce that you are now in the 花园. You decide to start listing off everything you see in the room, as if you were in a text adventure.



There is an exit to the north. Don't worry, it is unguarded. There is an exit to the west. Don't worry, it is unguarded.

infos.name: 小区投放点
infos.desc:
You're now in a 小区投放点.



You need an unguarded exit? You should try going east. You need an unblocked exit? You should try going north.

rooms.name: 家中
rooms.description: 日常垃圾散落在桌面和地上。

rooms.name: 厨房
rooms.description: 厨余垃圾和包装物混在一起。

rooms.name: 花园
rooms.description: 户外活动后也留下了一些垃圾。

targets.name: 苹果核
targets.tip: 厨余垃圾容易腐烂，应投放到厨余垃圾桶。

targets.name: 旧报纸
targets.tip: 纸张干净时属于可回收物。

targets.name: 废电池
targets.tip: 电池含有有害物质，应投放到有害垃圾桶。

targets.name: 脏纸巾
targets.tip: 被污染的纸巾通常属于其他垃圾。

targets.name: 塑料瓶
targets.tip: 空塑料瓶清理后可回收。

targets.name: 过期药品
targets.tip: 过期药品不能随意丢弃。

targets.name: 碎陶瓷碗
targets.tip: 碎陶瓷不可回收，注意包好防划伤。

targets.name: 外卖餐盒
targets.tip: 被污染的餐盒通常归入其他垃圾。

targets.name: 荧光灯管
targets.tip: 灯管含有害成分，需要专门回收。

targets.name: 剩米饭
targets.tip: 剩饭剩菜属于厨余垃圾。

take old newspaper

take used battery

insert dusty tissue into other waste bin
take plastic bottle

insert broken ceramic bowl into other waste bin
take glass bottle

take takeout box
insert takeout box into other waste bin
take metal can
insert metal can into recyclable bin
take fluorescent tube

take leftover rice

objective: 把垃圾投放到正确类别：苹果核→厨余垃圾、旧报纸→可回收物、废电池→有害垃圾、脏纸巾→其他垃圾、塑料瓶→可回收物、过期药品→有害垃圾、香蕉皮→厨余垃圾、碎陶瓷碗→其他垃圾、玻璃瓶→可回收物、油漆桶→有害垃圾、茶叶渣→厨余垃圾、外卖餐盒→其他垃圾、金属罐→可回收物、荧光灯管→有害垃圾、剩米饭→厨余垃圾
